statement.en: All rights reserved; public visibility does not grant permission to copy, modify, redistribute, or use commercially.
statement.zh-Hans: 保留所有权利；公开可见不代表授予复制、修改、再分发或商业使用许可。

statement.en: The site serves reviewed local derivatives for 71 works; 25 works link only to official object pages and 436 retain metadata-first no-local-image states.
statement.zh-Hans: 本站为71件作品提供经审核的本地衍生图；25件仅链接官方对象页，436件保持元数据优先、无本站本地图像。

statement.en: All rights reserved; public visibility does not grant permission to copy, modify, redistribute, or use commercially.
statement.zh-Hans: 保留所有权利；公开可见不代表授予复制、修改、再分发或商业使用许可。

public_scope.en: Only the curatorial text, third-party metadata, and approved media derivatives listed in this release are public.
public_scope.zh-Hans: 仅含本 release 列出的策展文字、第三方元数据与已批准媒体衍生图。

statement.en: Third-party metadata remains governed by the exact source rules and attribution notices.
statement.zh-Hans: 第三方元数据仍受精确来源规则与署名通知约束。
